title: The Battle for the Baratie Escalates
description: On pages 17–20, Krieg’s forces push harder against the Baratie, using numbers, weapons, and intimidation while Sanji and the cooks struggle to hold the line.
scene: The restaurant becomes a battlefield where Krieg’s idea of strength clashes with the Baratie’s pride and the Straw Hats’ refusal to yield.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No matter how many times I see it, his kicks are amazing...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A kitchen knife is the soul of a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's not something an amateur like you,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: should even think about touching.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Here...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now make sure you kick the bucket for good this time. I'll handle the rest.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: handle, my ass!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You're just a cook! You think you can take us pirates on!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Aghhhhh!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just a cook?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'll kill you scum...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Hah! To beat up all of'em using only your feet,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You strike me as a rather lazy guy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Or is that your policy?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A cook's hands are his life. I can't risk fighting within'em.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But don't worry, my feet'll be more than enough to take you down.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You take me down?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I'm afraid that just ain't happening! In the last 61 fights I've been in,

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've won them all without even so much as a scratch on me!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You may protect your hands in a fight, but I fight while protecting my entire body.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I've never even lost a single drop of blood in all the fights I've been in.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Not one, single drop.

summary: This part keeps increasing the pressure on the Baratie and exposes the brutality of Krieg’s command structure.
